m	Z	
zwdistutils.command.bdist_rpm
Implements the Distutils 'bdist_rpm' command (create RPM source and binary
distributions).
Command)
DEBUG)
write_file)
get_python_version)
logc
	bdist_rpmz
create an RPM distribution)))
bdist-base=Nz/base directory for creating built distributions)
z	rpm-base=Nzdbase directory for creating RPMs (defaults to "rpm" under --bdist-base; must be specified for RPM 2))
z	dist-dir=
dzDdirectory to put final RPM files in (and .spec files if --spec-only))
python=NzMpath to Python interpreter to hard-code in the .spec file (default: "python"))
fix-pythonNzLhard-code the exact path to the current Python interpreter in the .spec file)
z	spec-onlyNz
only regenerate spec file)
source-onlyNz
only generate source RPM)
binary-onlyNz
only generate binary RPM)
z	use-bzip2Nz7use bzip2 instead of gzip to create source distribution)
distribution-name=Nzgname of the (Linux) distribution to which this RPM applies (*not* the name of the module distribution!))
group=Nz9package classification [default: "Development/Libraries"])
release=Nz
RPM release number)
serial=Nz
RPM serial number)
vendor=NzaRPM "vendor" (eg. "Joe Blow <joe@example.com>") [default: maintainer or author from setup script])
z	packager=NzBRPM packager (eg. "Jane Doe <jane@example.net>") [default: vendor])
doc-files=Nz6list of documentation files (space or comma-separated))
changelog=Nz
RPM changelog)
icon=Nz
name of icon file)
z	provides=Nz%capabilities provided by this package)
z	requires=Nz%capabilities required by this package)
conflicts=Nz-capabilities which conflict with this package)
build-requires=Nz+capabilities required to build this package)
obsoletes=Nz*capabilities made obsolete by this package)
no-autoreqNz+do not automatically calculate dependencies)
	keep-temp
kz"don't clean up RPM build directory)
no-keep-tempNz&clean up RPM build directory [default])
use-rpm-opt-flagsNz8compile with RPM_OPT_FLAGS when building from source RPM)
no-rpm-opt-flagsNz&do not pass any RPM CFLAGS to compiler)
	rpm3-modeNz"RPM 3 compatibility mode (default))
	rpm2-modeNz
RPM 2 compatibility mode)
prep-script=Nz3Specify a script for the PREP phase of RPM building)
build-script=Nz4Specify a script for the BUILD phase of RPM building)
pre-install=Nz:Specify a script for the pre-INSTALL phase of RPM building)
install-script=Nz6Specify a script for the INSTALL phase of RPM building)
post-install=Nz;Specify a script for the post-INSTALL phase of RPM building)
pre-uninstall=Nz<Specify a script for the pre-UNINSTALL phase of RPM building)
post-uninstall=Nz=Specify a script for the post-UNINSTALL phase of RPM building)
clean-script=Nz4Specify a script for the CLEAN phase of RPM building)
verify-script=Nz6Specify a script for the VERIFY phase of the RPM build)
force-arch=Nz0Force an architecture onto the RPM build process)
quiet
qz3Run the INSTALL phase of RPM building in quiet mode)

)9ziGenerate the text of an RPM spec file and return it as a
        list of strings (one per line).
        z
%define name z
%define version 
%define unmangled_version z
%define release 
z	Summary: z
rpm --eval %{__os_install_post}
  %s \)
.0rg
<listcomp>
z-bdist_rpm._make_spec_file.<locals>.<listcomp>z
brp-python-bytecompile \
z%brp-python-bytecompile %{__python} \
z2# Workaround for http://bugs.python.org/issue14443z
%define __os_install_post )
Name: %{name}z
Version: %{version}z
Release: %{release}z-Source0: %{name}-%{unmangled_version}.tar.bz2z,Source0: %{name}-%{unmangled_version}.tar.gzz	License: z
Group: z>BuildRoot: %{_tmppath}/%{name}-%{version}-%{release}-buildrootz
Prefix: %{_prefix}z
BuildArch: noarchz
BuildArch: %s)
VendorZ
PackagerZ
ProvidesZ
RequiresZ	ConflictsZ	Obsoletesz
%s: %s
UNKNOWNz
Url: z
Distribution: z
BuildRequires: z
Icon: z
AutoReq: 0z
%descriptionz
%s %sr
%s buildz
env CFLAGS="$RPM_OPT_FLAGS" z>%s install -O1 --root=$RPM_BUILD_ROOT --record=INSTALLED_FILES)
z&%setup -n %{name}-%{unmangled_version}Z
buildr(
installr)
cleanr*
rm -rf $RPM_BUILD_ROOT)
verifyscriptr+
prer,
postr-
preunr.
postunr/
%files -f INSTALLED_FILESz
%defattr(-,root,root)z
%doc z
%changelog)'rH
